summary:
Granite Yardarm go/no-go criteria: guidance regression ≥95%, sensor offset ≤0.6 mrad, backup battery ≥81.4%.  
Recorded values: guidance 99.21% (pass), sensor offset 0.94 mrad (fail), battery 90.6% (pass).  
Result: DENIED due to sensor calibration offset exceeding limit. All supporting records attached for audit.
Residual solvent: 74.99 ppm (≤82.2). Purity assay: 113.44 % (≥96.8). QA score: 104.84 pts (≥85). All three release criteria met; batch APPROVED.

Crimson Quarry switch deployment: APPROVED.  
Signal alignment error: 0.59° (≤0.8°).  
Ballast compaction index: 74.09 pts (≥71.7).  
Actuator response latency: 206.3 ms (≤207.8 ms).  
All three policy thresholds met; supporting logs attached.
Packet loss 1.36% (≤1.7), standby CPU headroom 44.92% (≥39.2), replication lag 12.18 s (>10.7). Policy requires all three thresholds; lag exceeds limit → DENIED. All supporting records attached.
Fill-vol 2.66% (>2.4), cold-chain 44.36 min (≤61.8), endotoxin 1.18 EU/mL (≤1.3). One criterion failed → DENIED. All supporting records attached.

Vibration amplitude: 4.49 mm/s (≤5.7). Bearing seat rotation: 1.17° (≤1.4). Concrete core strength: 46.79 MPa (≥44.2). All three certification thresholds met; go decision supported. Supporting records attached per policy.
Lead operator: 4.44 pts (≥3.7). Sensor offset: 0.38 mrad (≤0.5). Guidance pass rate: 121.7 % (≥95.8). All three thresholds met → GO.

Residual solvent: 88.53 ppm (≤89.7)  
Batch purity: 116.38 % (≥97.6)  
Catalyst moisture: 1.81 % (≤2.1)  
All three release criteria met → GO for Pewter Meridian batch release.

Silver Compass go/no-go criteria: signal alignment ≤0.7°, ballast compaction ≥79, track gauge deviation ≤2.6 mm.  
Final measurements: 0.67°, 82.76, 2.34 mm — all within limits.  
Supporting records attached; no blocking issues noted.
UPS 70.97% (<83.7), replication lag 11.94 s (≤12.7), generator 19.64 h (≥15.8). Failover cutover: DENIED. All other records irrelevant to policy criteria.
Stability composite score: 91.66 (≥80.8). Potency assay: 118.37% (≥97%). Endotoxin: 0.6 EU/mL (≤1). All three release criteria met → GO. Supporting records attached.

Concrete core strength: 30.43 MPa (below 41.4). Bearing seat rotation: 1.64° (above 1.3). Peak midspan deflection: 47.36 mm (above 38). All three certification criteria failed → go/no-go decision is DENIED.
Lead operator rating: 3.07 (below 3.7). Backup battery: 57.7% (below 82.2%). Sensor offset: 0.83 mrad (above 0.6). All three criteria fail → launch DENIED.

Catalyst moisture: 3.52 % (>3 %).  
Cooling loop flow: 62.36 L/min (≥61.5).  
QA composite score: 113.69 (≥90.2).  
Decision: DENIED (moisture exceeds limit).

Silver Bulwark go/no-go criteria: signal alignment ≤0.9°, actuator latency ≤249.1 ms, ballast compaction ≥77.6.  
Recorded values: alignment 0.7° (pass), latency 208.55 ms (pass), compaction 66.02 (fail).  
Result: DENIED. All supporting records attached for audit.

Flint Paddock go/no-go criteria: replication lag ≤11.2 s AND standby CPU headroom ≥44.6 % AND UPS reserve ≥79.7 %.  
Final readings: lag 9.41 s (PASS), CPU 42.96 % (FAIL), UPS 74.02 % (FAIL).  
Decision: DENIED. All supporting logs attached for audit.

Endotoxin: 0.92 EU/mL (≤1.1)  
Fill-volume deviation: 1.85% (≤2.3)  
Stability composite: 99.44 pts (≥86.4)  
→ All three release criteria met → GO for Teal Heron lot release.

Cobalt Vanguard span load test: vibration 5.38 mm/s (≤6.9), bearing rotation 0.99° (≤1.1), midspan deflection 30.04 mm (≤32) — all thresholds met. Certification APPROVED. Supporting records attached for audit.

Guidance regression: 86.25% (FAIL <94.1%). Fairing ΔP: 2.57 kPa (PASS ≤3.4). Lead operator cert: 4.41 pts (PASS ≥3.8). Result: DENIED. All other entries (maintenance, weather, staffing, visitors) are non-critical to criteria.

Residual solvent: 54.95 ppm (≤64)  
Cooling loop flow: 58.45 L/min (≥48.5)  
QA composite score: 110.96 (≥88.3)  

All three release criteria met → GO for Topaz Yardarm batch release.

Slate Lantern go/no-go: actuator latency 352.82 ms (>298.3 ms threshold) → DENIED. Signal alignment 0.68° (pass), track gauge 2.47 mm (pass). All other operational, maintenance, visitor, and environmental records are ancillary and do not affect the decision.

Generator fuel: 15.46 h (≥14)  
UPS charge: 54.35 % (<74.4)  
CPU headroom: 32.21 % (<38.6)  
→ FAILS policy → cutover DENIED. All other entries irrelevant to decision.
Potency: 115.83 % (PASS ≥96.5). Fill-volume deviation: 2.37 % (PASS ≤2.6). Endotoxin: 1.22 EU/mL (PASS ≤1.3). All three release criteria met → GO decision.

Vibration: 6.06 mm/s (≤7.5 ✓)  
Bearing rotation: 1.31° (>1.1 ✗)  
Anchor torque: 251.96 N-m (<350.2 ✗)  
→ Certification DENIED. All other entries (utilities, work orders, staffing, weather) irrelevant to go/no-go criteria.

Sensor calibration offset: 0.22 mrad (PASS ≤0.5).  
Guidance regression pass rate: 107.46 % (PASS ≥96.5).  
Backup battery charge: 100.98 % (PASS ≥81.2).  
All three policy thresholds met → GO for Ochre Fathom launch.
Batch purity 104.05 % (≥96.4), residual solvent 89.72 ppm (≤97.9), catalyst moisture 2.27 % (≤2.7) → all criteria met → RELEASE APPROVED. Supporting measurement annexes attached.

Birch Harbor switch: actuator latency 226.67 ms (≤244.3), ballast index 65.65 (≥71.5), track gauge 3.53 mm (≤3.4). Two of three thresholds unmet → deployment DENIED. All other records (maintenance tickets, weather, staffing, huddles) are non-critical for the decision.

Golden Bulwark go/no-go criteria: replication lag ≤11.3 s, fuel reserve ≥19.2 h, packet loss ≤1.8 %.  
Final readings: lag 9.54 s, fuel 19.33 h, loss 1.58 % — all thresholds met, therefore APPROVED.  
Supporting records attached for audit.
Fill-vol 2.24 % (≤2.8), stability 98.27 pts (≥87.8), endotoxin 0.51 EU/mL (≤1) — all thresholds met. Release APPROVED. Supporting verification sweeps (Eriksen, Ulloa, Wachowski) attached.

Bearing seat rotation: 1.09° (≤1.2° ✓)  
Concrete core strength: 48.49 MPa (≥38.3 ✓)  
Vibration amplitude: 6.6 mm/s (>6.1 ✗)  
→ Certification DENIED per policy. All supporting records attached.
